app.name: Habit Compass

page.today.title: Today
page.today.summary: Today stays compact on purpose. You can finish the essentials here and ignore the deeper layers if you want a simple tracker.
page.today.stat.completedDetail: Simple progress for the current day
page.today.stat.tasksDetail: A short task list, not a project board
page.today.mockHabits.title: Habits due today
page.today.mockHabits.meta: Two are already moving, one still needs attention.
page.today.mockTasks.title: Tasks due today
page.today.mockTasks.meta: A short list for the day, with room to stay flexible.
page.today.moodPrompt.title: Mood prompt
page.today.moodPrompt.meta: Capture a quick emotional check-in only if it helps.
page.today.suggestion.title: Stay in minimum mode today
page.today.suggestion.description: Your day already looks full. A lighter version still keeps the habit alive.
page.today.simpleMode.title: Simple mode stays intact
page.today.simpleMode.meta: Today plus Items is enough for a normal lightweight routine.
page.today.menu.title: Actions for {item}
page.today.empty.today.title: Nothing planned for today.
page.today.empty.today.description: Add a habit or task to start.
page.today.empty.date.title: Nothing scheduled for this day.
page.today.empty.date.description: Pick another date or add an item from Items.
page.today.empty.search.title: No items found for this date.
page.today.toast.recurrent.pending: Recurrent task marked as not done.
page.week.title: Week
page.week.disabled.title: Weekly planning is off
page.week.disabled.description: You can keep the app in a simpler mode and only use Today plus Items, or enable weekly planning when it becomes useful.
page.week.focus.title: This Week's Focus
page.week.focus.empty: Add a focus for this week
page.week.focus.placeholder: What is your focus this week?
page.week.bigRocks.title: Big Rocks
page.week.bigRocks.helper: Choose up to {count} habits to focus on.
page.week.bigRocks.empty: Choose up to 3 habits to focus on this week.
page.week.bigRocks.limit: You can focus on up to 3 Big Rocks this week.
page.week.bigRocks.remove: Remove {habit} from this week's Big Rocks
page.week.bigRocks.selectorTitle: Choose a habit to focus on
page.week.bigRocks.selectorDescription: Big Rocks can only be active habits.
page.week.bigRocks.selectorEmpty: No active habits are available to add.
page.week.map.title: Weekly Map
page.week.map.helper: Only selected Big Rock habits appear here.
page.week.map.empty: Choose up to 3 habits to focus on this week.
page.week.lifeAreas.title: Life Areas
page.week.lifeAreas.helper: Only areas with selected Big Rocks are shown.
page.week.lifeAreas.empty: Life areas will appear after you choose Big Rocks.
page.week.review.title: Weekly Review
page.week.review.feeling.label: How did this week feel overall?
page.week.review.adjust: What should I adjust next week?

page.items.habit.dayAction.heading: Habit day actions

page.items.habit.amount.label: Amount
page.items.habit.stat.streakAria: Streak: {count, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}
page.items.habit.menu.title: Options for {habit}
page.items.habit.archived: {habit} was archived. Its history is preserved.
page.items.habit.reactivated: {habit} was reactivated. Archived days stay excluded from stats.
page.items.habit.empty.activeDescription: Create a habit when you want something repeatable to track.
page.items.habit.empty.archivedDescripti: Archived habits will appear here with their history preserved.
page.items.habit.empty.filteredDescripti: Change the search or category filter to see other habits.
page.items.habit.detail.title: Habit detail for {habit}
page.items.habit.detail.progressReset: Progress reset. The habit remains available.
page.items.habit.calendar.label: Calendar for {habit}
page.items.habit.edit.name: Name
page.items.habit.edit.minimumBinaryHelp: Leave empty to disable minimum completion for this habit.
page.items.habit.edit.minimumNumericHelp: Leave blank or enter 0 to disable minimum. Minimum must not exceed the standard target ({standard}).
page.items.habit.edit.error.name: A name is required.
page.items.habit.edit.error.endDate: End date must be on or after the start date.
page.items.habit.edit.error.minimumAbove: Minimum must not exceed the standard target ({standard}).
page.items.habit.edit.endDateWarning.tit: End date can archive this habit
page.items.habit.edit.endDateWarning.des: If you save an end date before today, this habit will be archived because its schedule has already ended. Its history stays available.
page.items.habit.confirm.reset.title: Reset progress?
page.items.habit.confirm.reset.descripti: This removes completion history for {habit}, but keeps the habit itself.
page.items.habit.confirm.delete.title: Delete habit permanently?
page.items.habit.confirm.delete.descript: This permanently removes {habit} and its completion history. This cannot be undone.
page.items.task.empty.activeDescription: Create a task when you need a one-time action to track.
page.items.task.empty.filteredDescriptio: Change the search or category filter to see other tasks.
page.items.task.edit.title: Edit task {task}
page.items.task.edit.name: Name
page.items.task.edit.error.name: A name is required.
page.items.task.confirm.delete.title: Delete task permanently?
page.items.task.confirm.delete.descripti: This permanently removes {task}. This cannot be undone.
page.items.recurrent.completedFeedback: Done. You can review completed recurrent tasks in Today.
page.items.recurrent.empty.activeDescrip: Create a recurrent task for responsibilities that repeat on a schedule.
page.items.recurrent.empty.archivedDescr: Archived recurrent tasks will appear here.
page.items.recurrent.empty.filteredDescr: Change the search or category filter to see other recurrent tasks.
page.items.recurrent.edit.title: Edit recurrent task {task}
page.items.recurrent.edit.name: Name
page.items.recurrent.edit.error.name: A name is required.
page.items.recurrent.edit.error.endDate: End date must be on or after the start date.
page.items.recurrent.edit.endDateWarning: End date can archive this recurrent task
If you save an end date before today, this recurrent task will be archived because its schedule has already ended. Stored occurrences stay available.
page.items.recurrent.confirm.delete.desc: This permanently removes {task} and its stored occurrences. This cannot be undone.
items.frequency.everyXWeeks: Every {count, plural, one {week} other {# weeks}} on {days}
items.frequency.everyXMonths: Every {count, plural, one {month} other {# months}} on day {day}
page.mood.title: Mood
page.mood.disabled.title: Mood tracking is off
page.mood.disabled.description: The app still works normally without mood. Turn it on only if emotional context would help you track more humanely.
page.mood.checkIn.title: Mood check-in
page.mood.checkIn.meta: A fast placeholder for one small emotional signal.
page.mood.reflection.title: Reflection
page.mood.reflection.meta: A light placeholder for daily or weekly notes.
page.mood.history.title: Mood history
page.mood.history.meta: A tiny contextual trail, not a full analytics chart.
page.mood.reflectionsDisabled.title: Reflections are off
page.mood.reflectionsDisabled.descriptio: Mood can stay fast and lightweight. Reflection remains an optional extra layer.
page.settings.title: Settings
settings.theme.title: Theme
settings.theme.description: Choose a stable visual mode or follow the system setting.
settings.locale.title: Language
settings.locale.description: Switch the shell between the current MVP locales.
settings.toggles.title: Optional depth
settings.toggles.description: Turn on only the layers you want to see in daily use.
settings.toggle.moodDescription: Show mood prompts and the mood page skeleton.
settings.toggle.weeklyPlanningDescriptio: Show the planning skeleton on the Week surface.
settings.toggle.habitCompletionLevelsDes: Track a smaller valid version of a habit when it helps.
settings.toggle.reflectionsDescription: Show reflection placeholders on mood-oriented surfaces.
settings.toggle.categoriesDescription: Use optional custom labels to organize items when useful.
settings.reset.title: Destructive actions
settings.reset.description: Soft reset is the expected default. Hard reset stays behind explicit confirmation later.
page.onboarding.title: Onboarding
onboarding.step.1.label: 1. Style
onboarding.step.2.label: 2. First habit
onboarding.step.3.label: 3. Personalize
onboarding.step.1.title: Choose your style
onboarding.style.simpleDescription: Keep the experience focused on Today and Items with very little setup.
onboarding.style.intentionalDescription: Keep the daily tracker, but add a little weekly structure and category thinking.
onboarding.style.adaptiveDescription: Use the shell that can adjust with mood, suggestions, and lighter or deeper days.
onboarding.step.2.title: Create a first habit placeholder
onboarding.step.2.description: This is not the final creation form yet. It just gives the onboarding flow a realistic place for your first tracking idea.
onboarding.step.3.title: Personalize the shell
onboarding.personalize.mood: Enable optional mood prompts in the daily shell.
onboarding.personalize.weeklyPlanning: Show the weekly planning skeleton when you want extra orientation.
onboarding.personalize.suggestions: Show simple rule-based suggestions in context.
mock.items.habit.walkMeta: Three times per week, kept intentionally lightweight.
mock.items.habit.readMeta: A quiet session target with optional completion levels.
mock.items.task.payMeta: One-off task with a due date placeholder.
mock.items.task.callMeta: Simple task card, no project hierarchy attached.
mock.items.recurrent.reviewMeta: Recurring every Friday, still shown as a lightweight placeholder.
mock.items.recurrent.plantsMeta: Recurring home task with simple cadence.
shared.loading.title: Loading data
shared.loading.description: The shell is fetching data from the current repository.
shared.error.title: Something went wrong
shared.error.description: The shell could not load data from the current repository.
page.items.empty.title: Nothing here yet
page.items.empty.description: This surface is ready for repository-backed data, but there are no visible items in the current list.
page.items.empty.archivedDescription: Archived items for this tab will appear here.
